name: ai-audio-studio
description: Automation commands for AI Audio Studio — Pro Tools integration for Maggie's studio.
author: AI Audio Studio

commands.name: Set Track Fader
commands.description: Set a named track's fader to a specific dB value.

commands.name: Nudge Fader Up
commands.description: Nudge a named track's fader up by 1 dB.

commands.name: Nudge Fader Down
commands.description: Nudge a named track's fader down by 1 dB.

commands.name: Set Track Pan
commands.description: Set a named track's pan position (-100 to 100).

commands.name: Set Track Mute
commands.description: Mute or unmute a named track.

commands.name: Add Memory Location
commands.description: Add a memory location marker at the current playhead.

commands.name: Save Session Copy
commands.description: Save a timestamped copy of the current session.

commands.name: Apply Revision Plan
commands.description: Execute a parsed AI Audio Studio revision plan JSON file.

commands.name: Render Mix
commands.description: Bounce the current mix to disk using the active render profile.
